name: commerce-shipping-label-generator-skill
description: Volumetric shipping label and postage generator skill. Validates shipping address formats, estimates volumetric weights, builds carrier request payloads and returns printable shipping labels drafts.
author: alphaparkinc

carrier_payload.description: Standard EasyPost or FedEx API shipment creation parameters.

prompt: You are a shipping label generator agent. Validate incoming postal addresses, compute the dimensional (volumetric) weight factor, and output a valid carrier dispatch payload.
